scenes.voice: Hello, young adventurers! Today, we're going on a journey to explore the amazing world of MY COMMUNITY!

scenes.subtext: A place where I live with my family and friends.
scenes.voice: My neighbourhood is where I live with my family and friends. It's where I go to school, play, and have fun.

scenes.subtext: People in my community help me in many ways.
scenes.voice: There are special helpers in my community, like teachers, doctors, and police officers. They help me stay safe and happy.

scenes.subtext: I can contribute to my community by being kind and helping others.
scenes.voice: I can help my community by being kind to others, sharing what I have, and taking care of the environment.

scenes.subtext: I am a part of my community and I feel happy to be here.
scenes.voice: I am a part of my community and I feel happy to be here. We all belong in our community, and we can make it a better place by being kind and helpful.
What kind of people help you in your community? Let's think... Ah-ha! It's the people who work in schools, hospitals, and police stations!
scenes.question: What kind of people help you in your community?

scenes.voice: So, let's summarize what we've learned today! My community is where I live with my family and friends. I have special helpers in my community who keep me safe and happy. And, I can help my community by being kind and sharing what I have. We all belong in our community, and it's a great place to be!
